item.title: Chicken Shawarma Crunchwrap
item.description: A fusion-style chicken shawarma crunchwrap combining seasoned chicken, fresh toppings, and a crispy wrap for a bold homemade meal.

media:content.media:title: Chicken Shawarma Crunchwrap
media:content.media:description: A fusion-style chicken shawarma crunchwrap combining seasoned chicken, fresh toppings, and a crispy wrap for a bold homemade meal.

item.title: Ramen Lasagna
item.description: A ramen lasagna recipe for an easy home-cooked dinner.

media:content.media:description: A ramen lasagna recipe for an easy home-cooked dinner.

item.title: Easy Breakfast Pizza
item.description: A simple breakfast pizza recipe topped with eggs, cheese, and breakfast favorites for a quick and satisfying morning meal.

media:content.media:title: Easy Breakfast Pizza
media:content.media:description: A simple breakfast pizza recipe topped with eggs, cheese, and breakfast favorites for a quick and satisfying morning meal.

item.title: Frito Corn Salad
item.description: A crunchy and creamy Frito corn salad made with simple ingredients, combining sweet corn, chips, and dressing for an easy side dish.

media:content.media:title: Frito Corn Salad
media:content.media:description: A crunchy and creamy Frito corn salad made with simple ingredients, combining sweet corn, chips, and dressing for an easy side dish.

item.title: Air Fryer Shrimp Fajitas
item.description: Quick and flavorful shrimp fajitas made in the air fryer with seasoned vegetables, offering an easy and healthy homemade meal.

media:content.media:title: Air Fryer Shrimp Fajitas
media:content.media:description: Quick and flavorful shrimp fajitas made in the air fryer with seasoned vegetables, offering an easy and healthy homemade meal.

item.title: Smoked Mac & Cheese BBQ Side
item.description: Creamy mac and cheese smoked for rich BBQ flavor, making a classic comfort food side dish perfect for grilling and outdoor meals.

media:content.media:title: Smoked Mac & Cheese BBQ Side
media:content.media:description: Creamy mac and cheese smoked for rich BBQ flavor, making a classic comfort food side dish perfect for grilling and outdoor meals.

item.title: Cherry Trifle Bowl Recipe
item.description: A layered cherry trifle dessert made in a bowl, combining cream, fruit, and cake for a colorful and easy sweet treat.

media:content.media:title: Cherry Trifle Bowl Recipe
media:content.media:description: A layered cherry trifle dessert made in a bowl, combining cream, fruit, and cake for a colorful and easy sweet treat.

item.title: Fried Egg Salad Sandwich
item.description: A crispy fried egg salad sandwich combining creamy filling, toasted bread, and simple ingredients for a hearty homemade meal.
